$comment: Expected outputs for statsService functions, keyed by input signature. Structure chosen as the cleaner 'mapping' option (option 2 from task spec): each function maps an input signature string to its expected output. Signatures: epley1RM/estimateNew1RM use '<weight>,<reps>'; calculateVolume uses the record id; calculateWeeklyCompletion uses the cycle id; bestEstimated1RM uses '<exerciseName>,<default1RM>'. Algorithms traced from /workspace/candito-v4-training-app/src/services/statsService.ts. epley1RM: reps<=0->weight, reps===1->weight, else weight*(1+reps/30). estimateNew1RM: reps<=0->weight, reps in {1:1.00,2:1.03,3:1.06,4:1.09}->Math.round(weight*mult), else Math.round(epley1RM). calculateVolume=Σ(actualWeight??targetWeight??0)*(actualReps??0). calculateWeeklyCompletion: completed=status in {completed,makeup}, percent=Math.round(completed/total*100).
